name: CreateConversation
description: Agent-initiated creation of a new SMS conversation with a citizen. Verifies authorization, checks idempotency (reuse if exists), inserts Conversation row, sends first message via SMS.

steps.name: AUTH_CHECK
steps.description: Verify caller's profile IDs intersect with the phone number's allowed profile IDs.
steps.failure: 403 Forbidden — Cannot create conversation with conversation phone number

steps.name: IDEMPOTENCY_CHECK
steps.description: Query for existing conversation with same ConversationPhoneNumberId + PartnerPhoneCode + PartnerPhoneNumber. If found: delegate to SendConversationReply and return 200.
steps.note: Prevents duplicate conversations — reuses existing thread.

steps.name: PHONE_NUMBER_EXISTENCE_CHECK
steps.failure: 404 Not Found — Conversation phone number was not found

steps.name: INSERT_CONVERSATION
steps.description: Construct Conversation entity and insert. No transaction wrapper visible — INSERT is synchronous via _baseRepository.Insert().
steps.note: Layer 0 does NOT use transaction. IDbSession.ExecuteInTransactionAsync pattern introduced in green-ai.

steps.name: CREATE_AND_SEND_FIRST_MESSAGE
steps.description: Build ConversationReadModel, call CreateAndSendConversationMessage with profileId + readModel + firstMessage text. Sends SMS outbound and inserts ConversationMessage row.

atomicity: NONE in Layer 0 — no transaction boundary around steps 4+5. PARTIAL STATE POSSIBLE if step 5 fails after step 4 commits.
